evidence: Most control flow is explicit and well-structured.
Crop shader uniform bindings are disconnected from the pipeline layout (empty bind_group_layouts) — the shader declares bindings that can never be satisfied.
Navigation key repeat/non-repeat branches duplicate the nav function call.

issues.summary: CROP_SHADER declares a uniform binding but the crop_pipeline_layout has no bind group layouts
evidence: CROP_SHADER (line 171): `@group(0) @binding(0) var<uniform> crop: CropUniforms;` — declares a uniform requirement.
This means the shader declares a binding that the pipeline layout doesn't satisfy — a structural lie that wgpu may catch at runtime or silently allow (as the fragment shader never reads the value).
issues.suggestion: Either register a CropUniforms bind group layout in the crop_pipeline_layout (and actually pass the crop rect), or remove the uniform declaration from CROP_SHADER and use a push constant or pass data via vertex buffers.

root_causes: Crop shader was scaffolded with bindings before the pipeline layout was finalized.
likely_symptoms: Potential wgpu validation error at runtime on strict backends; invisible crop overlay.
